step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the previous conclusion. Assessing changes in plaque scores provides a direct indication of how effectively the patient has been following recommended oral hygiene practices. While reducing gum bleeding also shows an improvement, focusing solely on this aspect might overlook significant areas where bacterial levels remain high despite visible signs of lessened inflammation. Therefore, combining these two assessments gives a comprehensive picture of overall oral health maintenance after receiving proper guidance. 

Answer choice: B.
